summary: Iteration 70 - ElevenLabs Premium Voice Integration. Backend: 100% passed (10/10 tests). GET /api/campaigns/pipeline/elevenlabs-voices correctly returns 10 voices with 'available: true'. POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/voice-preview works for both 'elevenlabs' and 'openai' voice_type. Frontend code has Premium (ElevenLabs) tab implemented with proper state management and UI rendering. UI test could not verify Premium tab visually because test user has no existing avatars in customize stage - the voice tab only appears after avatar generation.
critical_code_review_comments: ElevenLabs integration correctly implemented - ELEVENLABS_VOICES constant has 10 premium voices (Rachel, Liam, Drew, Bella, Emily, Gigi, Daniel, Bill, Charlotte, George)
Route order fix in pipeline/__init__.py ensures /elevenlabs-voices is not caught by /{pipeline_id} catch-all
Frontend loadElevenLabsVoices() called on component mount to pre-fetch voices

success_rate.frontend: Code verified - UI test limited due to no existing avatars

context_for_next_testing_agent: ElevenLabs integration tested successfully at API level. To test Premium voices UI: 1) Create/generate an avatar first, 2) The avatar editor customize stage shows Voice tab with 3 sub-tabs, 3) Premium tab shows ElevenLabs voices when available. Test user 'test@agentflow.com' has no avatars - need to create one to see voice customization.

backend_elevenlabs_voices.Voice list structure: PASSED - id, name, gender, accent, style fields present

api_test_results.test_get_elevenlabs_voices: PASSED - 10 voices (Rachel, Liam, Drew, Bella, Emily, Gigi, Daniel, Bill, Charlotte, George)
